name: Title Loans 365
description_short: Title Loans 365 is a Nevada-based title loan lender offering same-day cash loans secured by vehicle titles, serving Las Vegas, Henderson, and surrounding areas.
description_long:
Title Loans 365 operates as a title loan company headquartered in Nevada, specializing in secured loans using vehicle equity. The company markets itself as Nevada's top-rated title loan provider with a focus on fast approval and same-day funding. They are open 24/7 and handle applications through both online and phone channels (702-358-0633).

The company offers secured loans against car titles, truck titles, and RV titles. Their stated process involves online application, quote receipt, and same-day or rapid cash disbursement. Loan amounts appear to be determined by vehicle value. They require applicants to own the vehicle outright with a clear title, provide proof of residency (utility bill), Nevada driver's license, vehicle registration, proof of insurance, and proof of income. Borrowers must be Nevada residents, at least 18 years old.

Title Loans 365 highlights no prepayment penalties, daily interest accrual (pro-rated), flexible payment methods, the ability to keep your vehicle while the title is held as collateral, and claims of low interest rates. They market rapid approval timelines (minutes to hours) and position themselves against traditional banks that deny applicants with poor credit. Customer testimonials reference approval in under 25 minutes and positive experiences overcoming credit score barriers.

The company operates in a high-risk lending category. While they provide factual details about requirements and process, title loans by definition charge significantly higher interest rates than traditional lending and create financial risk if borrowers cannot repay—risking vehicle repossession. No specific APR ranges, maximum loan amounts, or actual customer interest rates are disclosed on the website. The business model depends on vehicle collateral and rapid approval with minimal underwriting.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No prepayment penalties—borrowers can pay off loans early without extra fees
Open 24/7 availability for customer contact and applications
Rapid approval and funding—testimonials report 25-minute cash disbursement
Borrowers keep possession and use of their vehicle during the loan term
Multiple flexible payment method options available
Accepts borrowers with poor credit when banks decline them
Pro-rated daily interest charged rather than fixed monthly rates
Serves multiple Nevada locations including Las Vegas, Henderson, North Las Vegas, and Boulder City
cons: Title loans are high-interest secured debt—actual APR and rate ranges not disclosed on website
Vehicle title held as collateral creates repossession risk if payments are missed
Limited to Nevada residents only—no service in other states
Requires clear/paid-off title and full vehicle ownership, excluding many borrowers
Marketing claims ('low interest rate') lack transparency without actual rate disclosure
best_for: Nevada residents with vehicle equity who need emergency cash and have poor credit histories
Vehicle owners facing immediate financial shortfalls (medical bills, past-due expenses) within Las Vegas metro area
Borrowers who can reliably repay within months and want to avoid traditional bank loan denials
diagnosis: Title Loans 365 is best for Nevada-based vehicle owners facing genuine emergency cash needs who cannot access traditional credit and own a vehicle outright. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-cost secured debt with undisclosed interest rates and real repossession risk; this product should only be considered as a last resort when other alternatives (personal loans, credit unions, family) are unavailable, and only by borrowers confident in their ability to repay within a reasonable timeframe.
services: Loan quotes based on vehicle information
Service across Las Vegas, Henderson, North Las Vegas, East Las Vegas, West Las Vegas, and Boulder City
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1810 E Sahara Ave #391, Las Vegas, NV 89104
